title: Project planner run complete
items: IC Education: no safe automated handler for `Replace mailto study-plan requests with a live form endpoint when credentials are available.`.
Investing Education: no safe automated handler for `Connect the weekly brief form to a real mailing-list provider.`.
Jobs Hunt: no safe automated handler for `Add the real payment URL to the paid pilot intake page.`.
IC Wearables: no safe automated handler for `Add provider credentials to IC_wearables/.env.local and rerun daily catalog.`.
NLP Keyboard: no safe automated handler for `Recruit first three beta testers and log setup completion.`.
3R Waste Leads: owner action required; calls/messages were not automated.
Phone update: installed and launched Project Planner.
